# SRC024 - Gartner Sales Survey: Rep-Free B2B Buying

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | B2B SaaS Buying |
| Authors / source | Gartner |
| Year | 2025 |
| Source type | Analyst survey press release |
| Quality | Medium-High |
| URL | [https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2025-06-25-gartner-sales-survey-finds-61-percent-of-b2b-buyers-prefer-a-rep-free-buying-experience](https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2025-06-25-gartner-sales-survey-finds-61-percent-of-b2b-buyers-prefer-a-rep-free-buying-experience) |

## Bias / limitation

Analyst firm; top-line only.

## Core takeaway

Many B2B buyers prefer digital self-service before engaging sellers.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to prioritize self-serve proof: docs, pricing, demos, comparison pages.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

